results.pub_name: The Four Universal Monarchies of the Prophecy of Daniel, and God’s Everlasting Kingdom
results.refcode_long: The Four Universal Monarchies of the Prophecy of Daniel, and God’s Everlasting Kingdom, p. 43.7 (James Springer White)
